zh.Asia, Manchester, Jamaika: 牙買加曼徹斯特亞西婭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa於1225年出生在俄羅斯Калужская областьТаруса時，他的父親Michael of Chernigov46歲，母親Olena Maria Romanova31歲。他於1242年與Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod在俄羅斯Калужская областьТаруса結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1279年享年55歲。

zh-hans.Asia, Manchester, Jamaika: 牙买加曼徹斯特亞西婭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa于1225年出生在俄罗斯Калужская областьТаруса时，他的父亲Michael of Chernigov46岁，母亲Olena Maria Romanova31岁。他于1242年与Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod在俄罗斯Калужская областьТаруса结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1279年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mihaylovich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian Mihailović and Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ). Compare Mihalovich .

variants.name: Mihajlovic
meanings: Serbian and Croatian (Mihajlović): patronymic from the especially Serbian personal name Mihajlo, an equivalent of Michael . Compare Mihailovich and Mihalovich .

nameMeanings.name: Rurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Buryk): nickname derived from buryy ‘dark brown’.

Slovak (mainly Burík and Búrik) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Burík): nickname from the archaic Slovak name burík for a (dark) gray horse, or derived directly from an adjective meaning ‘(dark) gray’ (in Slovak) or ‘dark brown’ (in Rusyn; compare 1 above).
Czech (Buřík): variant of Buřič (see Buric 1). Compare Burick .

variants.name: Buric
meanings: Czech (Buřič) and Slovak (Burič): nickname from Czech buřič, Slovak burič ‘rebel’.

Serbian and Croatian (Burić): patronymic from Buro, which may be a short form of the old personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, from buriti se ‘to stir up’, + slav, from slava ‘glory’), or a nickname for a big-bellied man derived from the root of burav ‘bellied’.
Croatian (Burić): nickname derived from bura ‘north wind’ (see Bura 2) and given to a child born when this wind was blowing. Compare Burich and Burick .

variants.name: Burick
meanings: Americanized form of Ukrainian, Rusyn, and Slovak Burik or Czech Buřik.
Americanized form of Czech Buřič and Slovak Burič or Serbian and Croatian Burić (see Buric ).

nameMeanings.name: Yurii
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual Russian form of   George  , also used occasionally in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa was born in 1225, in tarusa, Kaluga Oblast, Russia, his father, Michael of Chernigov, was 46 and his mother, Olena Maria Romanova, was 31. He married Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod in 1242, in tarusa, Kaluga Oblast, Russia. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1279, at the age of 55.

Il a épousé Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod en 1242, à tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1279, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusaが1225年にロシアКалужская областьТарусаで生まれた時，父Michael of Chernigovは46歳，母Olena Maria Romanovaは31歳であった。1242年にロシアКалужская областьТарусаでMarija Jaroslawna von Nowgorodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1279年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa(이)가 1225년 러시아 Калужская область Таруса에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael of Chernigov(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Olena Maria Romanova(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1242년 러시아 Калужская область Таруса에서 Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1279년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa родился в 1225 г. в местности Таруса, Калужская область, Россия, его отцу по имени Michael of Chernigov было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Olena Maria Romanova, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod в 1242 г. в местности Таруса, Калужская область, Россия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1279 г. в возрасте 55 лет.
